title: mentha × rotundifolia var. elongata
intro: Mentha × rotundifolia var. elongata, also known as Corn Mint or Elongated Round Peppermint, is a perennial herb in the mint family, characterized by its elongated leaves and purple flowers. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional folk medicine, where it is valued for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and digestive properties, making it a natural remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Mentha × rotundifolia var. elongata include relief from digestive problems, nausea, and headaches, as well as its ability to combat respiratory infections and reduce fever. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infused oil, or used fresh in salads, making it a versatile ingredient in herbal remedies.
